resources.string: This operation will delete all account data and log out.
The account data has been deleted. You can go to Google Account for further processing.
Your Google account will not be affected.
In the next %s hours,all ads will be removed for you
Enjoy smooth video and music playback experience
All ads will be removed before %s
Congratulations on getting the ad-free privilege!
Watch 1 Rewarded Ad,and get %s hours ad-free privilege!
Watch rewarded video ads,remove all ads in the next %s hours
Watch 1 Rewarded Ad,and get %s hours ad-free privilege!
There is an issue with the current playback. The app needs to be restarted.
Do you want to resume playback from where you left off before the restart?
Auto popup when screen is locked
Due to the policy, we cannot play music when the screen is locked. But we recommend turning on the Power Saving Mode for non-stop music streaming.
This content is provided by a third party website
According to YouTube\'s Terms of Use, this video cannot be played in the background.
This content has been blocked for you.
Use gestures to control player brightness
This channel doesn\'t feature any other channels
Прекорачено је ограничење броја знакова: %1$d од %2$d
Please enter the comment source you want to customize
Restricted mode has hidden comments for this video.
%1$s неће функционисати ако не омогућите Google Play услуге.
%1$s не може да се покрене без Google Play услуга, које нису инсталиране на уређају.
%1$s има проблема са Google Play услугама. Пробајте поново.
%1$s не може да се покрене без Google Play услуга, које уређај не подржава.
%1$s не може да се покрене ако не ажурирате Google Play услуге.
%1$s не може да се покрене без Google Play услуга, које се тренутно ажурирају.
Потребна је нова верзија Google Play услуга. Ускоро ће се ажурирати.
This form is for reports of infringement, please ensure that the following information you fill out is accurate, all statements must be true for you to submit your report.
Title and screenshot of content to report
URL(s) of original content, it could be a link to a video, a LIVE video, or music
Full legal name of the copyright owner
I am an authorized agent of the copyright owner
I am the legal counsel to the copyright owner
I am an employee of the copyright owner
I am a host, officer, or director (non-legal) of the copyright owner
Your relationship to the copyright owner
Seems to have encountered an error, please refresh or try again.
We have received your feedback. Please pay attention to the mailbox, we will process and reply you within 7 working days.
Линк је копиран у привремену меморију
Note: Deleting playlists is a permanent action and cannot be undone.
Are you sure that you want to delete %1$s?
Always ask where to save download
The \"SAF\" allows you to save files to external SD card. Some devices are incompatible.
Force reporting of undeliverable Rx exceptions outside of fragment or activity lifecycle after disposal
Fan Privilege already activated. Can not enter invitation code now
Can not enter your own code.
Start to play content faster but from less exact position when adjusting the video progress bar
Tap again to exit the application.
In order to provide a better homepage recommendation experience, please choose a way to get started!
Search for the content you interested to start a wonderful video journey.
Log in to your account for a better homepage recommendation experience.
In order to provide a better homepage recommendation experience, please wait patiently.
Sign in to find more videos you like.
Watch history allows us to show you the latest videos tailored to your interests.
Leave your email or phone number so that we can contact you if needed.
Please describe the issue in details :)
Contact us to share your feedbacks on:
We regret that %1$s did not satisfy you and we look forward to your feedback or suggestions.
Are you sure clear all the history?
This list has no videos, please try pull down to refresh.
Request error, please try pull down to refresh.
Are you sure clear all the Local history?
Double click to close the guide.
More interesting live and personalized recommendation videos are online!
Sign in to access videos that your’ve liked or saved
If you block this person, you won\'t be able to see their messages. They won\'t see your messages either, unless you post to a channel where they\'re a moderator.
You have not creat a channel yet.
There is no chat news at this time,you can try to switch time for experience.
Thanks. We\'ve received your report. If we find this content to be in violation of our Community Guidelines, we will remove it.
All messages you send will appear publicly
The language will change once the app is restarted.
Sign in now to browse your subscriptions and playlists.
Изаберите пре подне или по подне
Пређите у режим сата ради уноса времена.
Пређите у режим уноса текста ради уноса времена.
Max download tasks at a time
The maximum amount of times to retry download
Ова дозвола је потребна за отварање у искачућем режиму
Пређите на режим уноса у Календару
Додирните да бисте прешли на избор дана
Додирните да бисте прешли на избор године
Please create a channel on YouTube before this action.
Restricted Mode has hidden discussions for this channel.
Subscribe to your favorite channels to get notified about their latest videos.
Timer: This Video has finished playing.
To support PIP mode, the app needs permission to appear above other apps.
To Minimize videos, the app needs permission to appear above other apps.
In order to support floating window, please grant permission to open.
Your device cannot support that resolution
Please be noted that you need to pass the reCAPTCHA test to use the App. Don\'t forget to click Submit button under the I\'m not robot checkbox to finish the verification.
Please fill out the required field.
This video is age restricted.\10\10Turn on \"Age restricted content\" in the settings if you want to see it.
Resume playback from last played position
Enjoying %1$s? How about showing your support by giving 5-star rating?
Adding download task successfully. Show your love by giving 5 stars?
%1$s has blocked %2$d ads for you today. Show your love by giving 5 stars?

Dear user:\10Please be sure to carefully read and fully understand the terms of the service agreement and privacy policy, including but not limited to: In order to provide you with better services, we need to collect your application installation information, version number, operation logs, etc. for analysis and optimization application performance. thanks for your trust.\10You can read the \"%1$s\" and \"%2$s\" for details. If you agree, please click the button below to start accepting our services.
Terms of service and Privacy Policy
Search terms include restricted keywords and search results cannot be displayed
All your search history will be deleted and it can’t be recovered.
Try different keywords or remove search filters
Hey! Check out this %1$s app. It provides premium service for free: ads-free, background play and more! Unlock all features by entering my invitation code: %2$s\10⏬ Install it now! ⏬
Hey! Check out this %1$s app. It provides premium service for free: ads-free, background play and more!\10⏬ Install it now! ⏬
Double click to like the video
Original texts from services will be visible in stream items
Show original time ago on items
Failed to get your login status, please try to sign in again
Subscribe to get the latest videos from channels you love
Sign in to see updates from your favorite YouTube channels
PIP in Tuber is for free
Please turn off other players and retry.
Phone number or email for contact
Sorry for the bad experience you had. We\'d love to hear from you to improve our app.
Why do you want to uninstall %1$s？
Thanks for your feedback.We will use it to fix problems and improve our services.
Could not recognize the URL. Open with another app?
Feature is diabled due to YouTube limitation. We\'ve fixed this issue in latest version.
Loading time is longer due to YouTube bugs. We\'ve fixed this issue in latest version.
Ready to install, installation permissions are required.
No videos in this playlist yet
Sign in to manage your library videos.
Sign in now to browse your subscriptions、playlist、history、watch later and more.
Attention. This video contains violent or inappropriate content.
click here to control the auto play switch.
Exit the page or switch %1$s to the background, the video will continue to play.
the video will be played in the form of a floating window.
Use gestures to control player volume
